_provenance: FALLBACK: R and the cir package were unavailable at fixture-generation time. cir_x/cir_y values are hand-computed from first principles: each test case has y already strictly non-decreasing so PAVA makes no pooling moves; the only CIR step is collapsing each flat level-set to its weight-centroid x, retaining the plateau y. Verified by manual arithmetic. Regenerate with Rscript generate_cir_fixtures.R once R + cir are available to replace with live oracle values.
